== Notes for [[Item:Q100632|Q100632]] ==

[http://www.pbs.org/wnet/heritage/episode4/presentations/4.6.1-1.html '''De La Cavalleria Family Tree''' -audio]
--------------------
Fuente: http://www.bisabuelos.com

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD8641181EFBBFA9822EF79916C1798
geni:6000000001500832969

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
